summary: Added maxHistorySize cap to AlertManager and maxPendingWrites backpressure to AuditLogger writeQueue
notes: AlertManager now accepts { maxHistorySize: N } option (default: 1000). _alertHistory capped via FIFO eviction (shift oldest on overflow). AuditLogger now accepts { maxPendingWrites: N } option (default: 100). _enqueueWrite rejects with Error when queue is full, _pendingWrites decrements on completion via .finally(). 8 new regression tests. All 331 model-manager tests pass.
